name: PhotoBrief
description: AI-guided visual intake. Convert a shareable link into an AI-quality-checked photo brief.

auth.instructions: API keys (prefix pb_) are issued on the Business plan from Settings → Team → API Keys. Pass as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

capabilities.name: Create photo request
capabilities.description: Create a new photo request for a named recipient and return a shareable URL.

capabilities.name: Lookup pricing and plan limits
capabilities.description: Retrieve current PhotoBrief plans, prices, request quotas, and feature availability.

capabilities.name: Read PhotoBrief FAQ
capabilities.description: Retrieve canonical answers to common questions for businesses and recipients.
